task_language: turn on the stove and put the pan on it
strategy_notes: Perception-isolated stove+pan task. Same seed (s0) as the reference recipe at the seed-0 referencerecipe_10_task_t2_s0.jsonl, so scene coordinates match; verified by indexing world_hi_00.npy: pan ~(-0.21,-0.10,0.90) on left, stove burner ~(-0.17,0.18,0.92) on right, moka pot (distractor) in middle. Replayed proven 13-command recipe verbatim: (1) move to (-0.18,0.19,1.05) over the knob, (2) pi0_pick repurposed as CONTACT driver with prompt='turn on the stove', lift_thresh=999, gripper_closed_thresh=0 -- burner glowed red after 25 chunks confirming stove-on; (3) retreat up, traverse over moka via waypoint (-0.1,-0.05,1.15), drop to pan pre-position (-0.064,-0.22,1.05); (4) pi0_pick 'pick up the frying pan' (lift_thresh=0.05, gripper_closed_thresh=0.06) succeeded in 15 chunks with peak lift 0.144m; (5) set_gripper +1 (8 steps) to firm grip, lift to z=1.15, route via (-0.05,0,1.15) avoiding moka, over burner at (-0.009,0.28,1.15); (6) descend to z=1.1 then z=1.0 over (0,0.3), release. libero_terminated=true on release. No reset, 13 commands.
